problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Polymer. Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
